headline: How Investors May Respond To Aon (AON) Expanding AI-Focused Compensation Analytics Capabilities
summary: Aon plc recently enhanced its Radford McLagan Compensation Database, adding AI-specific job families, AI-enabled job matching, API-based data submission, and real-time labor market insights to help HR teams benchmark emerging AI roles more accurately. By deepening its coverage of AI talent and compensation, Aon is positioning its human capital analytics platform as a critical tool for employers competing in a rapidly evolving labor market for specialized AI skills. We’ll now examine how...
